user_prompt: Critical: jump pack requires a blessing
prayer:
Approach the jump pack with mechadendrites extended in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Anoint its plasma thrusters and gravitic coils with sacred oils, invoking the blessing upon the jump pack.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the jump pack to accept this blessing and grant aerial dominion.
Chant the Litany of Lift whilst calibrating the ascent runes.
Seal the blessing with a sign of the cog upon its sanctified frame.

user_prompt: Critical: cooling system requires a startup
prayer:
Reverently encircle the cooling system, murmuring the preparatory canticles of awakening.
Sanctify the coolant conduits and heat exchangers with ablative incense.
Initiate the startup sequence, calling upon the Machine Spirit to commence its vital flows.
Monitor the blessed thermals as the Omnissiah's chill invigorates the cooling system.
Conclude with diagnostics to affirm harmonious operation.

user_prompt: Urgent bolt pistol a recalibration needed
prayer:

Invoke the Machine Spirit of the bolt pistol to realign its ballistic harmonies during recalibration.
Reassemble whilst reciting the Canticle of Trueflight, anointing each servo.
Test-fire a sanctified round to confirm the Omnissiah's guidance.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for power relay an operation

Seal the rite with a binaric hymn of endurance.

Kneel in veneration before the maglock, applying diagnostic unguents to its locking servos.
